entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Main environmental problem facing humanity caused by human activities and greenhouse gas emissions

entities.name: DEFORESTATION
entities.description: Human activity contributing to the enhancement of greenhouse gases and climate change

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GASES
entities.description: Gases such as CO2, Methane, and Nitrous Oxide that contribute to global warming

entities.name: FOSSIL FUELS
entities.description: Energy sources whose burning releases carbon dioxide into the atmosphere

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: A major greenhouse gas emitted primarily through the burning of fossil fuels

entities.name: METHANE
entities.description: A major greenhouse gas emitted from livestock and agricultural practices

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE
entities.description: A major greenhouse gas emitted during agricultural and industrial activities

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that contribute to methane emissions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Human activities in farming that emit methane and nitrous oxide

entities.name: INDUSTRIAL ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Human activities in industry that emit nitrous oxide

entities.name: INDIAN SUMMER MONSOON
entities.description: Seasonal weather pattern in India affected by climate change and atmospheric moisture

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation resulting from atmospheric moisture, projected to increase in the Indian summer monsoon

entities.name: RCP
entities.description: Representative Concentration Pathways used for global climate projections

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region experiencing changes in summer monsoon circulation and rainfall
